default.description: General-purpose reasoning — Gemini Pro + Grok + DeepSeek, orchestrator judge

budget.description: Cost-sensitive — budget models, clerk judge. ~half the cost of default

frontier.description: Max quality — frontier models only, jumbo judge

diverse.description: Max diversity — 5 models across 5 labs for hard problems

adversarial.description: Fact-checking / devil's advocate — researcher judge flags contradictions

swarm_frontier.description: Kanban Swarm: 4 Frontier workers (GPT-5.5-medium, Gemini-3.5-Flash-medium, Claude-Opus-4.8, Grok-4.3)

swarm_cheap.description: Kanban Swarm: 4 Budget workers (GLM-5.2, Mimo-v2.5-Pro, MiniMax-M3, DeepSeek-V4-Pro)

swarm_all.description: Kanban Swarm: All 8 workers — 4 frontier + 4 cheap

definitive_power.description: Definitive Power Swarm: 4 Frontier (GPT-5.5-medium, Gemini-3.5-flash-medium, Claude-Opus, Grok-4.3) + 2 Best Cheap (GLM-5.2, DeepSeek-V4-Pro)
